name: 21"x43" Thick Border Outdoor One Piece Chair Cushions Slate Blue - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Dress up your patio or lounge chairs with this Thick Border Outdoor One-Piece Chair Cushion from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Featuring a rectangular design, this cushion in slate blue is adorned with a thick white border for an elegant touch. Made from recycled polyester, the cushion has polyurethane foam filling and tie-ons for easy attachment. Plus, it's resistant to water, UV rays, the weather and fading for long-term use.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
